title: My Family
text: My name is Maria. I am twenty-five years old. I live with my family in a small house. My father is a teacher. My mother works in a hospital. I have one brother and one sister. My brother is older than me. He is twenty-eight. My sister is younger. She is twenty. We have a dog. His name is Max. We are a happy family.
translation: Me llamo María. Tengo veinticinco años. Vivo con mi familia en una casa pequeña. Mi padre es profesor. Mi madre trabaja en un hospital. Tengo un hermano y una hermana. Mi hermano es mayor que yo. Tiene veintiocho años. Mi hermana es menor. Tiene veinte. Tenemos un perro. Se llama Max. Somos una familia feliz.

questions.question: How old is Maria?
questions.explanation: The text says 'I am twenty-five years old.'

questions.question: What does Maria's father do?
questions.explanation: The text says 'My father is a teacher.'

questions.question: What is the name of the dog?
questions.explanation: The text says 'His name is Max.'

title: A Day at School
text: I go to school every day. School starts at eight o'clock. First, I have English class. I like English because the teacher is very nice. Then I have math. Math is difficult but interesting. At twelve o'clock, I eat lunch with my friends. After lunch, I have science and history. School finishes at three o'clock. After school, I play soccer with my friends.
translation: Voy a la escuela todos los días. La escuela empieza a las ocho. Primero, tengo clase de inglés. Me gusta inglés porque la profesora es muy simpática. Después tengo matemáticas. Las matemáticas son difíciles pero interesantes. A las doce, almuerzo con mis amigos. Después del almuerzo, tengo ciencias e historia. La escuela termina a las tres. Después de la escuela, juego al fútbol con mis amigos.

questions.question: What time does school start?
questions.explanation: The text says 'School starts at eight o'clock.'

questions.question: Why does the student like English?
questions.explanation: The text says 'I like English because the teacher is very nice.'

questions.question: What does the student do after school?
questions.explanation: The text says 'After school, I play soccer with my friends.'

title: At the Restaurant
text: Today I am at a restaurant with my friend Ana. The restaurant is small but very nice. I look at the menu. There are many options. I want pasta and a salad. Ana wants fish and rice. We order our food. The waiter brings our drinks. I have water and Ana has orange juice. The food is delicious. After dinner, we have chocolate cake. It is a very good evening.
translation: Hoy estoy en un restaurante con mi amiga Ana. El restaurante es pequeño pero muy lindo. Miro el menú. Hay muchas opciones. Quiero pasta y una ensalada. Ana quiere pescado y arroz. Pedimos nuestra comida. El mozo trae nuestras bebidas. Yo tomo agua y Ana toma jugo de naranja. La comida está deliciosa. Después de la cena, comemos torta de chocolate. Es una muy buena noche.

questions.question: What does the narrator want to eat?
questions.explanation: The text says 'I want pasta and a salad.'

questions.question: What does Ana drink?
questions.explanation: The text says 'Ana has orange juice.'

title: My Weekend
text: On Saturday morning, I usually wake up late. I have breakfast at ten o'clock. I eat toast and drink coffee. In the afternoon, I go to the park with my family. My children play in the playground. In the evening, we watch a movie at home. On Sunday, I clean the house in the morning. In the afternoon, I visit my parents. We have lunch together. I love weekends because I can relax.
translation: Los sábados a la mañana, generalmente me levanto tarde. Desayuno a las diez. Como tostadas y tomo café. A la tarde, voy al parque con mi familia. Mis hijos juegan en los juegos. A la noche, vemos una película en casa. El domingo, limpio la casa a la mañana. A la tarde, visito a mis padres. Almorzamos juntos. Me encantan los fines de semana porque puedo relajarme.

questions.question: What time does the narrator have breakfast on Saturday?
questions.explanation: The text says 'I have breakfast at ten o'clock.'

questions.question: What does the narrator do on Sunday afternoon?
questions.explanation: The text says 'In the afternoon, I visit my parents.'

title: The Weather Today
text: Today the weather is very nice. It is sunny and warm. The temperature is twenty-five degrees. I am wearing a T-shirt and shorts. Yesterday it was cold and rainy. I wore a jacket and carried an umbrella. Tomorrow the weather will be cloudy. Maybe it will rain in the afternoon. I prefer sunny days because I can go outside and play. When it rains, I stay home and read books.
translation: Hoy el clima está muy lindo. Está soleado y cálido. La temperatura es de veinticinco grados. Estoy usando una remera y shorts. Ayer estuvo frío y lluvioso. Usé una campera y llevé un paraguas. Mañana el clima va a estar nublado. Quizás llueva a la tarde. Prefiero los días soleados porque puedo salir y jugar. Cuando llueve, me quedo en casa y leo libros.

questions.question: What is the weather like today?
questions.explanation: The text says 'It is sunny and warm.'

questions.question: What does the narrator prefer?
questions.explanation: The text says 'I prefer sunny days.'

questions.question: What was the weather like yesterday?
questions.explanation: The text says 'Yesterday it was cold and rainy.'
